---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or enhancement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the practical problem you want to solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the expected behavior and user flow.

## Use Case

Explain where and how this feature will be used in real deployment.

## Safety Considerations

Describe any impact on pump control, alarm handling, or fail-safe behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Any diagrams, links, or notes.
